name: Mutton Kura
steps: Marinate the mutton with curd, turmeric and half the ginger garlic paste for one hour.
Brown the onions well in oil, then add remaining ginger garlic paste and curry leaves.
Add tomatoes and the spice powders, and cook until the masala releases oil.
Add the mutton and sear on high heat, then pressure cook with a cup of water until fork-tender.
Simmer open until the gravy thickens and coats the meat; finish with garam masala.
